scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=web
scripts.docker:dev: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build
scripts.docker:hotreload: docker compose -f docker-compose.hotreload.yml down && docker compose -f docker-compose.hotreload.yml up --build -d
scripts.docker:hotreload:rebuild: docker compose -f docker-compose.hotreload.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.hotreload.yml build --no-cache && docker compose -f docker-compose.hotreload.yml up -d
